steps.expected: Import page renders with design-system styling

frictions.description: Company Settings currently links to absolute /company/export and /company/import URLs, which earlier produced Not Found pages during browser testing.
frictions.resolution: Retested the actual page routes directly on /WEA/company/export and /WEA/company/import to validate the style assertion itself.

summary: Revalidated VAL-GUI-EXP-C4-003 on the correct company-prefixed routes: pass.
